title: All I Had Was Nothingness
original_title: Je n'avais que le néant : "Shoah" par Lanzmann
overview: Forty years after the release of Claude Lanzmann’s monumental film Shoah, Guillaume Ribot reveals the director’s relentless pursuit to tell the untold, using only Lanzmann’s words and unseen footage from the masterpiece.
